sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 38

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 38:1
items.html:
(to the question) Zivug Aleph [first coupling]
The first Zivug [coupling] made upon the MAN [Mayin Nukvin] means the Bi'ah Kadma'a [first coming], which makes in the upper one a vessel and the Rucha Kadma'a [first spirit]. The MAN — which are the Galgalta ve Eynaim of the lower one, present with their upper one in that coming and Zivug — cannot receive from there even the form of an embryo [Ubar], because this Zivug is made in the one above their upper one, and they must come out by way of the degree — that is, through the Zivug in their own upper one. Therefore they do not receive the discernment of Ibur [conception] until the second coming and Zivug, made in the degree of the upper one; and then they receive the form of the embryo. See Answer 11 (p. 735, Items 6 and 7)
